entities.description: case a is a scenario described as involving a new conceptual entity
new entity refers to a conceptual entity that is being evaluated for relevance against existing entities
existing entities are the set of entities against which the relevance of a new conceptual entity is measured
relevance scores are the metrics used to measure the relationship between the new entity and existing entities
gradient refers to a mathematical pattern or value that is absent in the relevance scores for new entities
discriminative pattern refers to a distinguishing feature or trend that is not present in the relevance scores for new entities

relations.description: case a describes the scenario where a new entity is introduced and evaluated
the new entity s relevance scores are calculated against all existing entities
